regulatory_context.summary: State and system AI context checked only at high level; institution-level sources carry the profile.

narrative_summary: Stanford University shows an AI posture with five documented initiatives across 5 categories. The evidence emphasizes AI at Stanford Advisory Committee, Stanford HAI, and HAI AI Index. Policy maturity is coded as comprehensive based on public guidance, privacy language, governance, or tool controls. The profile also records teaching, research, workforce, equity, or enterprise-tool activity where sources support it. Leadership names, enrollment, GPU counts, and contract values are left null when not found in the cited public sources.

gaps_acknowledged: Leadership names and enrollment were not populated in this missing-only sweep.
Detailed AI budgets, user counts, and GPU counts were not consistently public.
No controversy record was added without a reliable institution-specific source.

strategic_archetype.rationale: Primary archetype selected from visible public signals: governance led.
